reviews.comment:
El bar atienden muy bien. Ahora sí tenés que cargar diesel hay que ir con paciencia xq el surtidor está separado de los de nafta ya que es una estación de servicio vieja. Entonces tienen a una persona que va y viene entre los dos surtidores pero le da más prioridad al de nafta.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the bar is very good. However, if you need to fill up with diesel, you have to be patient because the pump is separate from the gasoline pumps, as it's an older service station. They have an attendant who goes back and forth between the two pumps, but they prioritize the gasoline pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCd1JsOVBWRmgxZVdneWEwdFpiVlprTURKUE5HYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amable la señora que atiende en el shop, además encontré productos sin tacc que no se consigue siempre!! Hermoso el lugar, muy tranquilo y el espacio verde súper cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
The lady who works at the shop was very friendly, and I even found gluten-free products, which aren't always available! The place is beautiful, very peaceful, and the green space is super well-maintained.

reviews.comment:
Se demora mucho para cargar ya q había solo 1 playero para atender los surtidores de nafta y los surtidores de gas q se encontraban  a 50mt de los de nafta.

(Translated by Google)
It takes a long time to refuel because there was only 1 attendant to attend to the gasoline pumps and the gas pumps that were located 50 meters from the gasoline pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xScmVVVmxja2xhUWtSRlZtaGpiRkUwTTBkelJGRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de la cafetería excelente! Lo maleducado y mala atención del playero deja mucho que desear! En plena tormenta, apenas terminamos de cargar combustible, nos hizo correr el vehículo porque un amigo de él quería guardar la camioneta bajo techo, encima sin consumir nada! Tuvimos que bajarnos con niños en plena tormenta y resguardarnos en en bar. Por supuesto el auto afuera. Miércoles 18/02 a las 20.30 hs.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the cafeteria was excellent! However, the attendant's rudeness and poor service left much to be desired! In the middle of a storm, as soon as we finished filling up, he made us move our vehicle because a friend of his wanted to park the truck under cover, even though we hadn't bought anything! We had to get out with children in the middle of the storm and take shelter in the bar. Of course, the car was left outside. Wednesday, February 18th at 8:30 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taMFVVNDVOM3BEVmxGc2VVOWFiWGRVTURkc1VWRRAB
